title: Edit BOQ Item
description: Adjust one line's description, quantity, unit and rate.

steps.title: Item description
steps.description: The wording that appears on the printed bill.
steps.voiceScript: Edit the item description exactly as it should read on the bill.
steps.captionText: Edit the item description exactly as it should read on the bill.
steps.fallbackMessage: Item description: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Quantity and rate
steps.description: Quantity times rate gives the line total.
steps.voiceScript: Set the quantity and rate. The line total is quantity times rate.
steps.captionText: Set the quantity and rate. The line total is quantity times rate.
steps.fallbackMessage: Quantity and rate: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Save the line
steps.description: The section and floor totals update at once.
steps.voiceScript: Save. The section and floor totals recalculate immediately.
steps.captionText: Save. The section and floor totals recalculate immediately.
steps.fallbackMessage: Save the line: not visible on this screen yet.
